series_metadata.series_description: JFS 05200 forms, “Authorization for Clearance, Rules Filing, and Publication,” signed by attorneys to authorize the filing of rules, and the issuance of transmittal letters, by the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS); Testimony of interested parties at public hearings held on proposed rules by ODJFS, including audiotapes and transcripts when created; Requests for waivers of Clearance in the rulemaking process; Comments submitted by interested members of the public by means other than the Clearance & Rule Administration system (CLARA) in response to draft rules and other draft documents in Clearance.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: all data has been entered into system
